category_title: Students with persistent wariness and environmental sensory preoccupations
scenario_title: Play session with therapy dog in the dinner hall
minimal_context: The student and teacher are in the school dinner hall attempting to play simple games with a therapy dog.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's play a simple game with the dog.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (The student is very preoccupied with touching surfaces in the room and following markings on the floor in a repetitive manner, initiating no interactions.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Come over here and sit down.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (The student sits close, holding hands and looking to the teacher for reassurance, responding briefly to the request.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The dog is walking over to us now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Showing wariness, the student watches the dog in order to move away as it gets too close.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's play a simple game with the dog.

STUDENT: (The student is very preoccupied with touching surfaces in the room and following markings on the floor in a repetitive manner, initiating no interactions.)

TUTOR: Come over here and sit down.

STUDENT: (The student sits close, holding hands and looking to the teacher for reassurance, responding briefly to the request.)

TUTOR: The dog is walking over to us now.

STUDENT: (Showing wariness, the student watches the dog in order to move away as it gets too close.)

task.learning_goal: encourage interactions (through verbal, gestural or physical prompts) between dog and child

context.materials: surfaces in the room, markings on the floor, dog
context.social_setting: teacher alone for the first two minutes, then with the dog as well

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: if it [the dog] got too close
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: wariness, watching the dog in order to move away
related_quotes: awareness and visual interest in the dog was accompanied by wariness, watching the dog in order to move away if it got too close.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: very preoccupied with touching surfaces in the room, or following markings on the floor in a repetitive manner
related_quotes: levels of playing alone and repetitive/sensory interests were also higher with teacher alone than when the dog was present.
the student was very preoccupied with touching surfaces in the room, or following markings on the floor in a repetitive manner.

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: slightly more passive... initiating fewer interactions (in showing objects or initiating joint attention)
related_quotes: sensory interests and ritualistic behaviour and mannerisms impacted greatly on the student’s capacity to engage.
